attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the entire expansion panel instance and all items

attributes.name: enroll
attributes.description: Auto-expand non-disabled items when registered

attributes.name: mandatory
attributes.description:
Mandatory expansion behavior:
- false (default): All panels can be collapsed
- true: Prevents collapsing the last expanded panel
- 'force': Automatically expands the first non-disabled panel

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description:
Enable multi-expansion mode
- false (default): Single panel expanded at a time (accordion mode)
- true: Multiple panels can be expanded simultaneously
Note: Changes v-model type from T to T[]

attributes.name: renderless
attributes.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

attributes.name: namespace
attributes.description: Namespace for dependency injection

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the entire radio group

attributes.name: mandatory
attributes.description:
Auto-selects the first non-disabled item on mount.
Radio groups are inherently mandatory (selection can only be changed, not cleared),
so `mandatory="force"` is the only meaningful option.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the group

attributes.name: ariaLabelledby
attributes.description: ID of element that labels this group

attributes.name: ariaDescribedby
attributes.description: ID of element that describes this group

attributes.name: ariaRequired
attributes.description: Whether a selection is required before form submission

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name - enables native form submission for all radios in group

attributes.name: activation
attributes.description:
Activation mode controlling when selection occurs:
- `automatic` (default): Selection follows focus (arrow keys select)
- `manual`: Selection requires explicit Enter/Space key press

Per WAI-ARIA APG, radio groups should have selection follow focus by default.
Use `manual` for toolbar radio groups or when deliberate selection is preferred.

attributes.description: Namespace for context injection from parent Radio.Root

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name (defaults to context value from Radio.Group)

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Submitted value when checked (defaults to context value or 'on').
Use to override the Radio.Root value for form submission.

attributes.name: form
attributes.description: Associate with form by ID (for inputs outside the form element)

attributes.description: Namespace for context injection from parent Radio.Root

attributes.description: Value associated with this radio for group selection and form submission

attributes.description: Form field name - triggers auto hidden input when provided
